de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy

Class SimplifyTermStrategy.Factory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.SimplifyTermStrategy.Factory
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, StrategyFactory
    Enclosing class:
    SimplifyTermStrategy

    public static class SimplifyTermStrategy.Factory
extends Object
implements StrategyFactory
    The StrategyFactory to create instances of SimplifyTermStrategy.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Strategy create(Proof proof, StrategyProperties sp)

      • create

        public Strategy create(Proof proof,
                       StrategyProperties sp)
        Create strategy for a proof.
        Specified by:
        create in interface StrategyFactory
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof a strategy is created for
        sp - the StrategyProperties to customize the strategy

        the newly created strategy

      • getSettingsDefinition

        public StrategySettingsDefinition getSettingsDefinition()
        Returns the StrategySettingsDefinition which describes how an user interface has to look like to edit StrategySettings supported by created Strategy instances.
        Specified by:
        getSettingsDefinition in interface StrategyFactory
        Returns:
        The StrategySettingsDefinition which describes the user interface.
